name: best_take
description: Segment a clip into takes and score each by speech confidence and delivery quality. Returns takes ranked best-first.

output.description: JSON with ranked takes array — each item has start, end, score, confidence, wpm, word count, and transcript text

params.name: model
params.description: Whisper model for transcription. Larger = slower + more accurate confidence scores.

params.name: min-pause
params.description: Minimum pause between words to define a take boundary (seconds)

params.name: min-words
params.description: Minimum words in a take to include in results
